mapper.select: select e.emp_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, d.dept_name, p.pos_name, e.emp_email, e.emp_mobile, e.emp_status, e.hire_date from employee e join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id join department d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where e.com_id = #{comId} order by pos_order, emp_no

select e.emp_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, d.dept_name, p.pos_name, e.emp_email, e.emp_mobile, e.emp_status, e.hire_date, e.dept_id, e.pos_id, e.created_at, e.updated_at from employee e join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id join department d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where e.emp_id = #{empId} and e.com_id = #{comId}
mapper.insert: insert into employee(emp_no, emp_pass, emp_name, dept_id, pos_id, com_id, emp_email, emp_mobile, emp_status, hire_date) values (#{empNo}, #{empPass}, #{empName}, #{deptId}, #{posId}, #{comId}, #{empEmail}, #{empMobile}, #{empStatus}, #{hireDate})
mapper.update: update employee set emp_name = #{empName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, pos_id = #{posId}, emp_email = #{empEmail}, emp_mobile = #{empMobile}, emp_status = #{empStatus} where emp_id = #{empId} and com_id = #{comId}
mapper.select: select e.*, d.dept_name, p.pos_name from employee e join department d on d.dept_id = e.dept_id join emp_position p on p.pos_id = e.pos_id where e.emp_email = #{empEmail}
select e.*, p.pos_name from employee e join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id where e.dept_id = #{deptId}
